DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_data;
CREATE TABLE test_data(x UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT varPop(x) AS var_pop FROM test_data;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nested_data;
CREATE TABLE nested_data(a UInt8, b Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT varPop(a) AS var_pop_a, varPop(b) AS var_pop_b FROM nested_data;
CREATE TABLE another_data(x UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO another_data SELECT number FROM numbers(10);
SELECT varPop(x) AS var_pop FROM another_data WHERE x > 5;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS join_data;
CREATE TABLE join_data(id UInt8, value Float32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO join_data VALUES (1, 1.1), (2, 2.2), (3, 3.3), (4, 4.4);
SELECT j.id, varPop(j.value) AS var_pop FROM join_data j JOIN (SELECT id FROM join_data WHERE value > 2) AS filtered ON j.id = filtered.id GROUP BY j.id;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS group_data;
CREATE TABLE group_data(category String, price Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT category, varPop(price) AS var_pop FROM group_data GROUP BY category;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS multi_table_data;
CREATE TABLE multi_table_data(id UInt8, value UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO multi_table_data VALUES (1, 5), (1, 10), (2, 20), (2, 30);
CREATE TABLE related_data(id UInt8, weight UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO related_data VALUES (1, 2), (1, 3), (2, 4), (2, 5);
SELECT m.id, varPop(m.value + r.weight) AS var_pop FROM multi_table_data m JOIN related_data r ON m.id = r.id GROUP BY m.id;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS decimal_data;
CREATE TABLE decimal_data(x Decimal(10, 2)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO decimal_data VALUES (10.25), (20.75), (30.50), (40.00);
SELECT varPop(x) AS var_pop FROM decimal_data;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases(x Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO edge_cases VALUES (NULL), (NULL), (1), (2), (3);
SELECT varPop(x) AS var_pop FROM edge_cases WHERE x IS NOT NULL;
